instruction: pick the mug from the cabinet, place it under the coffee machine dispenser, and press the start button
解释: After placing the mug, the robot aligns its gripper with the portafilter handle and begins to push it, rather than targeting the start button on the front panel of the coffee machine.
如何恢复: Stop the current motion, retract the gripper from the portafilter handle, and reposition it to press the correct start button on the front panel.
